_comment: WTW Master DNA Schema v1.2 — Shared contract between all three modules. Field names and types are fixed. Do not rename without team agreement.

metadata.taste_version: integer — increment by 1 on every schema write
metadata.fingerprint_embedding_ref: string — pgvector row ID, updated by Assignment 3 after embedding regeneration

strand_a_creative_affinity._comment: Affinity scores for individual crew members. Keyed by TMDB person ID.

<tmdb_person_id>.name: string
<tmdb_person_id>.confidence: float 0.0 to 1.0 — increases with consistent signals, decreases with contradictions
<tmdb_person_id>.sample_size: integer — number of titles this score is based on
<tmdb_person_id>.lineage_boost: none | low | medium | high — whether to traverse influence graph for this person

strand_b_narrative_dimensions._comment: Qualitative taste dimensions. Values are enums or floats. Notes field is plain English — updated by LLM after significant changes.

moral_ambiguity.notes: string — plain language summary of what we know

humor_style.value: string — e.g. observational_character_driven | slapstick | dry | none

protagonist_type.value: string — e.g. flawed_self_aware | anti_hero | ensemble | everyman

strand_c_visceral_specs._comment: Quantitative weights for pacing, tone, and aspect preferences. All floats 0.0 to 1.0.

aspect_weights._comment: How much the user cares about each filmmaking aspect. Derived from deep survey opt-ins.

exclusion_rules._comment: Hard exclusions. These titles/people/genres are NEVER shown. Parsed from free-text by Groq.
exclusion_rules.id: string — TMDB person ID or genre ID where applicable
exclusion_rules.name: string — human readable
exclusion_rules.raw: string — original free-text the user typed

soft_preferences._comment: Score modifiers. Not eliminations — they adjust ranking.
soft_preferences.weight_modifier: float 0.0 to 1.0 — multiplied against composite score

temporal_modifiers._comment: Conditional rules. Applied only when condition is detected in session context.
temporal_modifiers.boost: string — dimension or tone to boost under this condition
temporal_modifiers.suppress: string — dimension or tone to suppress under this condition

signals._comment: Every title discussed or watched. This is the raw history — never delete entries.
signals.title: string
signals.regret_signal: glad_watched | neutral | regret | null — filled in 48hr post-watch
signals.reason: string — why the user reacted this way, in plain language
dimensions_reinforced: array of strand_b field names this signal speaks to
dimensions_contradicted: array of strand_b field names this signal pushes against
signals.confidence: float 0.0 to 1.0 — how certain we are about this signal

open_questions: string — things the system does not yet know about this user. Append-only during sessions. Resolved by Assignment 3.
learning_loop.temporal_decay_applied: boolean — true if decay has been run on this schema version

stretch_pick_history.title: string
stretch_pick_history.accepted: boolean — did the user watch it
dimensions_stretched: which strand_b or strand_c dimensions this violated

recommendation_history.accepted: boolean — did user engage with it
recommendation_history.fingerprint_version: integer — which taste_version generated this recommendation
